title: DOJ seeks comment on proposal that OVC grantees must use TIMS, an electronic database
description_html: The DOJ Office for Victims of Crime (OVC) Training and Technical Assistance Center seeks comment on a currently existing information collection regarding proposed revisions to the OVC Trafficking Information Management System (TIMS), a web-based database and reporting system for the Victims of Human Trafficking Grant and the Enhanced Collaborative Model Grant initiatives. OVC will require OVC Grantees to use this electronic tool to submit grant performance data, including demographics about human trafficking victims. [ID #886]
description_text: The DOJ Office for Victims of Crime (OVC) Training and Technical Assistance Center seeks comment on a currently existing information collection regarding proposed revisions to the OVC Trafficking Information Management System (TIMS), a web-based database and reporting system for the Victims of Human Trafficking Grant and the Enhanced Collaborative Model Grant initiatives. OVC will require OVC Grantees to use this electronic tool to submit grant performance data, including demographics about human trafficking victims. [ID #886]
